title: RepoBrief agent benchmark against grep/read
goal: Measure the incremental value of RepoBrief MCP for real coding-agent work against the ordinary grep, glob and targeted-read workflow without fabricating model runs or promoting RepoBrief by default.
completion: A frozen multi-repository taskset, provider-neutral runner contract and deterministic evaluator are implemented and validated.
A read-only provider runner is separately qualified for exact model identity, provider-reported usage, tool-call capture, isolated checkouts and immutable transcripts.

A separate live preflight proves one hard-cost-bounded baseline/treatment pair, treatment MCP availability, valid receipts, source integrity and separated snapshot/freshness latency before batch dispatch.
Real paired baseline and RepoBrief-augmented agent runs use the same model, prompt, budgets and isolated sessions with provider-reported tokens and bound transcripts.
Navigation, structural reasoning, grounding, freshness, false confidence, time, tool-call and token outcomes are reported without post-hoc task tuning.
RepoBrief remains opt-in unless a separate reviewed decision establishes a reproducible benefit without material quality or safety regression.

metadata.comparison: baseline grep/glob/read versus the same tools plus RepoBrief MCP

RAB-V1-T001.outcome: Frozen taskset, provider-neutral runner boundary, complete pair matrix, receipt integrity checks and deterministic evaluator are merged and validated.

RAB-V1-T002A.outcome: The isolated read-only Claude runner is merged with frozen-plan binding, derived identities, strict tool boundaries, hash-bound transcripts, provider evidence validation and synthetic-only fixture reports.

RAB-V1-T002B.scope: Exactly one frozen baseline/treatment pair with at most USD 1.00 per provider process and USD 2.00 total authorized spend.
RAB-V1-T002B.stop_rule: Any invalid receipt, missing treatment MCP use, stale/non-comparable state, budget stop, timeout or source mutation ends the preflight without retry.

RAB-V1-T002.blocker: Requires verified RAB-V1-T002B live provider evidence before any 96-run dispatch.

RAB-V1-T003.condition: Requires completed real paired runs from RAB-V1-T002.

metadata.sequencing: Qualify the runner, verify one cost-bounded live pair, execute the real paired benchmark, decide adoption, and only then prioritize bureau#482 incremental rebuild or file-watcher work.
does_not_establish: answer correctness outside the fixed taskset
